surface: api (MCP tools: cloak_setup, cloak_status, cloak_cookies_list, cloak_cookies_status)

adversarialCases.scenario: list cookies for a site whose records carry secret values
adversarialCases.expected: every value is [redacted] and the raw secret appears nowhere in the serialized tool output

adversarialCases.scenario: list/status cookies for a multi-account site with no account chosen
adversarialCases.expected: structured needs-account signal with availableAccounts, no records returned

adversarialCases.scenario: call cloak_cookies_list with a non-string workspace
adversarialCases.expected: structured invalid-args signal, never a raw throw

regressions: none — full mcp suite (11 tests incl. Phase-0 spike/bundle/import) green; engine untouched.
